name: TotalReClaw
description: OpenClaw-native operational memory that recalls prior records and session context before work repeats itself.
author: Trent Doney

enableAutoRecall.label: Enable Auto Recall
enableAutoRecall.help: Run a pre-prompt TotalReClaw lookup on operational prompts.

enableAutoCapture.label: Enable Auto Capture
enableAutoCapture.help: Accumulate session context as messages are written and create reviewable session drafts on close/reset.

dbPath.label: SQLite Database Path
dbPath.help: SQLite file used for durable memory records and accepted session summaries.

storePath.label: Legacy Lesson Store Path
storePath.help: Deprecated JSONL import path used only for one-time migration of older lesson stores.

draftPath.label: Draft Path
draftPath.help: Directory used for reviewable capture and session-summary drafts before records are accepted.

sessionStatePath.label: Session State Path
sessionStatePath.help: Directory used for in-flight session accumulators before they are finalized into drafts.

hookTimeoutMs.label: Hook Timeout
hookTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time the automatic recall hook is allowed to run before failing open.

priorFixThreshold.label: Prior Fix Threshold
priorFixThreshold.help: Confidence required before a failure-fix record is surfaced as a prior fix.

conflictWindow.label: Conflict Window
conflictWindow.help: Score distance at which two records are treated as conflicting.

maxRecordsInjected.label: Max Injected Records
maxRecordsInjected.help: Maximum number of matched records or session summaries injected into the prompt hook.

maxTokensInjected.label: Max Injected Tokens
maxTokensInjected.help: Approximate token budget for the injected recall context.

summaryModel.label: Summary Model
summaryModel.help: Summary generation mode for session drafts. `deterministic` keeps all generation local.
